MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Leon L. Vickman, Esq. 818/788-1136 for pltfs (appearing via Courtcall); Arden Van Upp, (no tel. #), deft in pro per.
RULING: Argued and the Court continues the matter for further status conference hearing to 10/17/02. No further papers required. (Receiver to consider deft's views as stated on the record.) (AJR/JH)

Osc/Tro/Pi
Off Calendar Aug-15-2002 Continued To Sep-10-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Leon Vickman, Esq. 818/788-1136 for pltf & moving party (appearing via Courtcall); Arden Van Upp, deft & opposing party in pro per.
RULING: Argued and the Court issues the preliminary injunction and appoints receiver. Order signed in open court. In addition, Court continues the matter for status conference re receiver's expenses to 09/10/02; report to be filed by 08/29; deft's response due 09/04. (AJR/JH)
